app.name: VALIDIKA
app.tagline: Kotala solo ya bafamasi ya RDC

error.sessionExpired: Ntango na yo esili. Kota lisusu.

home.welcomeTitle: Kotala solo ya famasi na kimia
home.welcomeSubtitle: Luka, tala solo mpe bilembo ya siantifike ya bafamasi oyo bandimami na RDC.
home.searchHint: Nkombo, licence to nimero ya ordre...

placeholder.title: Ekoya kala te
placeholder.candidacyBody: Kotinda demande na application ya telefone ekoya na mise a jour mosusu. Okoki kotinda demande na site VALIDIKA.

auth.loginSubtitle: Kokota na compte na yo ya VALIDIKA
auth.registerSubtitle: Kosangana na VALIDIKA na basegonde moke
auth.name: Nkombo mobimba
auth.passwordHint: Nkoma 12 na se moke, na majuscule, minuscule, chiffre mpe symbole
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Kotia code ya chiffre 6 oyo etindami na email na yo.

pharmacists.searchHint: Nkombo, licence, nimero ya ordre, ville...
pharmacists.noResults: Famasi moko te ekokani na koluka na yo.

verify.title: Kotala solo ya bato nyonso
verify.inputLabel: QR token, nimero ya licence to nimero ya ordre
verify.scanInstructions: Tia QR code ya famasi na kati ya cadre.
verify.resultNotFound: Eloko moko te emonani mpo na code oyo.
verify.resultCompromised: Elembo ebebi: ba donnée ekokani te na signature oyo ebombami.
verify.lastCheckedAt: Verification ya suka na internet mokolo ya {}

account.title: Compte na ngai
account.notLoggedIn: Kota mpo na kozwa profil mpe ba demande na yo.
account.logoutConfirmBody: Okosengela kokota lisusu mpo na kozwa compte na yo.

candidacy.title: Kotinda demande
candidacy.subtitle: Kokota na registre ya bafamasi ya RDC na miniti mike.
candidacy.scanCta: Scanner dokima (carte pro, diplome, pieces d'identite)
candidacy.scanSuccess: Nkombo etondisami banda na dokima oyo escane. Tala malamu liboso ya kotinda.
candidacy.scanEmpty: Ba informations ezwami te automatiquement. Kotisa yo moko.
candidacy.submitSuccess: Demande etindami malamu! Okoki kolanda statut na ye na compte na yo.
